title: syntax error t_array_pattern_unpacked.v with default init
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contained and self-checking so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs

```
git diff
diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v b/test_regress/t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v
index 60e710d92..64c6ea966 100644
--- a/test_regress/t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 module t (/*AUTOARG*/);
 
    logic [3:0] array_simp [1:0] [3:0];  // descending range array
+   wire  [2:0] inject_e_err[1:0] = '{default:'0};
 
    int         irep[1:2][1:6];
```

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```
./t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.py

%Error: t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v:10:34: syntax error, unexpected '=', expecting ',' or ';'
   10 |    wire  [2:0] inject_e_err[1:0] = '{default:'0};
      |                                  ^
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

```
Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-49-g905c0c4f6
```

What OS and distribution are you using?

```
Linux 4.18.0-553.22.1.el8_10.x86_64
```

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

(Please avoid attaching screenshots that show text - you can convert images to text using e.g. https://ocr.space)
code_blocks:
git diff
diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v b/test_regress/t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v
index 60e710d92..64c6ea966 100644
--- a/test_regress/t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 module t (/*AUTOARG*/);
 
    logic [3:0] array_simp [1:0] [3:0];  // descending range array
+   wire  [2:0] inject_e_err[1:0] = '{default:'0};
 
    int         irep[1:2][1:6];
./t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.py

%Error: t/t_array_pattern_unpacked.v:10:34: syntax error, unexpected '=', expecting ',' or ';'
   10 |    wire  [2:0] inject_e_err[1:0] = '{default:'0};
      |                                  ^
Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-49-g905c0c4f6
Linux 4.18.0-553.22.1.el8_10.x86_64
